sqlReaderQuery.value:
select t1.* from (select
ap.rptId
,ap.ChildProfileId
,ap.LessonId
,ap.inCurrentPlan
,ap.IepGoalId
,ap.IepGoal_DateDeleted
,ap.IepObjectiveId
,ap.IepObjective_DateDeleted
,ap.ChildProfileLessonTargetId
,ap.StatusId
,ap.Description
,ap.ChildProfileLessonTarget_DateCreated
,ap.ChildProfileLessonTarget_DateLastModified
,ap.ChildProfileLessonTarget_DateDeleted
,ap.ChildProfileLessonTarget_DateMastered
,ap.Active
,ap.ChildAccountInfoId
,ap.ChildAccountType
,ap.ChildL3AccountId
,ap.ChildL2AccountId
,ap.ChildL1AccountId
,ap.MonthYear
,ap.Year
,ap.WeekYear
,ap.WeekFirstDay
,ap.DateMasteredMonthYear
,ap.DateMasteredYear
,ap.DateMasteredWeekYear
,ap.DateMasteredWeekFirstDay
,ap.DateMasteredChildAccountInfoId
,ap.DateMasteredChildAccountType
,ap.DateMasteredChildL3AccountId
,ap.DateMasteredChildL2AccountId
,ap.DateMasteredChildL1AccountId
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON ap.childProfileId = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
--and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_rptTargets t2 on t1.rptId = t2.rptId
Where t2.rptId IS NULL

select t1.* from (select ap.rptId
,ap.DateLogged
,ap.actionId
,ap.memberId
,ap.hollowSubscriberId
,ap.childProfileId
,ap.lessonId
,ap.videoName
,ap.resourceId
,ap.TrainingTestId
,ap.AccountInfoId
,ap.behaviorTrackingId
,ap.iep
,ap.MemberAccountInfoId
,ap.MemberAccountType
,ap.MemberL3AccountId
,ap.MemberL2AccountId
,ap.MemberL1AccountId
,ap.MonthYear
,ap.Year
,ap.WeekYear
,ap.WeekFirstDay
,ap.RowKey
,ap.stepNo
,ap.appVersion
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateCreated
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_rptUserActivityLog t2 on t1.rptId = t2.rptId
WHERE t2.rptId IS NULL

select t1.* from (select --ap.*
ap.Id
,ap.DateChanged
,ap.UserId
,ap.AccountType
,ap.[Profile]
,ap.Support
,ap.AccountName
,ap.AccountStatus
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.Userid    )
						--inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.memberId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_tblChangeTracking t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL

select t1.* from (select  ap.ID
,ap.AccountRoleID
,ap.MemberId
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 	
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.memberId    )
--inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.memberId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountinfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join tblMemberAccountRole t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL

select t1.* from (select ap.ID
,ap.MemberID
,ap.FeatureID
,ap.Enabled
,ap.StartDate
,ap.EndDate
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 	
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.memberId    )
--inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.memberId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountinfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_tblMemberFeatureHistory t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL

select t1.* from (select  ap.ID
,ap.MemberID
,ap.RoleID
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.memberId    )
--inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.memberId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountinfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_tblMemberRole t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL

select t1.* from (select  t.ID
,t.UserName
,t.Email
,t.Password
,t.PasswordQuestion
,t.PasswordAnswer
,t.Comment
,t.IsApproved
,t.DateLastLoggedIn
,t.DateLastPasswordChanged
,t.IsOnLine
,t.IsLockedOut
,t.DateLastLockedOut
,t.FailedPasswordAttemptCount
,t.FailedPasswordAttemptWindowStart
,t.FailedPasswordAnswerAttemptCount
,t.FailedPasswordAnswerAttemptWindowStart
,t.DateLastActive
,t.DateCreated
,t.DateLastModified
,t.DateDeleted
,t.accountInfoID
,t.title
,t.screenName
,t.firstName
,t.lastName
,t.phoneNumber
,t.mobileNumber
,t.hollowPhotoLocation
,t.tipOfTheDay
,t.groupMessageEmail
,t.hearAboutUs
,t.Notes
,t.logoFileName
,t.collegeName
,t.courseNoName
,t.instructorName
,t.instructorContact
,t.childRelationShipId
,t.childRelationshipText
,t.PhotoLocation
,t.empBenefitChildRelationShipId
,t.empBenefitChildRelationshipText
,t.groupScreenname
,t.hideNewFeaturesReminder
,t.emailPreference
,t.HideBehaviorManagementPopup
,t.TwoFactorVerificationCode
,t.middleName
,t.guid
,t.tempGuid
,t.apiKey
,t.passwordResetToken
,t.passwordResetDate
,t.EnableAccountAPI
,t.TermsOfUseAccepted
,t.TermsOfUseAcceptDate
,t.EnableAppAuthenticationAPI
,t.SMSPhone
,t.DeletedBy
,t.ModifiedBy
,t.CreatedBy 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} t
inner join accountinfo a on (t.accountinfoid=a.id)
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  t.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_tblMember t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL

,('ActionTracking')
,('IntegrationPartnerDetail')
,('hcAppointmentUncancelReasons')
,('hcAddress')
,('hcFormResponse')
,('hcPropagatingAccountInfo')
,('hcPropagatingStaffMember')
,('SubscriptionRecurrence')
,('HistoricalGroups')
,('hcNoteType')
,('LessonBehaviorGraphLink')
,('SystemTeachingSteps')
,('ChildProfileClinicalSettings')


SELECT @TotalCount = COUNT(1) FROM #TEMP

WHILE @Count <= @TotalCount
BEGIN
SET @TableName = NULL
	SELECT @TableName = TableName FROM #TEMP WHERE ID = @Count
	IF @TableName = 'hcAppointments'
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(AppointmentId INT,StartDate date)')
	END
	ELSE IF @TableName = 'AppointmentSandataInfo'
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(AppointmentId INT)')
	END
	ELSE IF @TableName = 'ChildProfileAssessmentResponse'
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(childProfileId INT,assessmentAssessmentQuestionId INT)')
	END
	ELSE IF @TableName = 'ChildProfileDiagnosis'
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(childProfileId INT,diagnosisId INT)')
	END
	ELSE IF @TableName = 'ChildProfileSandataInfo'
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(ChildProfileId INT,MedicaidId nvarchar(100))')
	END
	ELSE IF @TableName IN('ChildProfileTeamMember','ChildProfileTeamMemberOrg','ChildProfileTeamMemberPreferences')
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(ChildProfileId INT,memberId INT)')
	END
	ELSE IF @TableName IN('hcFormResponseLessonsExcluded')
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(HcFormResponseId INT,LessonId INT)')
	END
	ELSE IF @TableName IN('hollowAccountInfoSubscriber')
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(accountInfoId INT,subscriberId INT)')
	END
	ELSE IF @TableName IN('hollowAccountLeaderRole6')
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(accountInfoId INT,memberID INT)')
	END
	ELSE IF @TableName IN('hollowChildProfileLessonStatus')
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(childProfileId INT,lessonId INT)')
	END
	ELSE IF @TableName IN('MFAUnsubscribedMembers')
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(MemberId INT)')
	END
	ELSE IF @TableName IN('PhaseChangeForBehavior')
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(PhaseChangeId INT,BehaviorTrackingId INT)')
	END
	ELSE IF @TableName IN('PhaseChangeForLesson')
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(PhaseChangeId INT,CurrentCurriculumId INT)')
	END
	ELSE IF @TableName IN('rptUserActivityLog')
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(rptId INT)')
	END
	ELSE IF @TableName IN('SessionScheduleLesson')
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(sessionScheduleId INT,lessonId INT)')
	END
	ELSE IF @TableName IN('StaffMemberSandataInfo')
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(MemberId INT,MedicaidId nvarchar(100))')
	END
	ELSE IF @TableName IN('ScheduledReportAdditionalParameters')
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(ScheduledReportId INT)')
	END
	ELSE IF @TableName IN('ChildProfileClinicalSettings')
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(ChildProfileId INT)')
	END
	ELSE IF @TableName IN('rptTargets','rptObjectives')
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(rptId INT)')
	END
	ELSE IF @TableName IN('RecapProfiles')
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(ChildProfileId INT,MemberId INT)')
	END
	ELSE
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(ID INT)')
	END

	SET @Count = @Count + 1
END


End

BEGIN

SELECT @TotalCount = COUNT(1) FROM #TEMP

WHILE @Count <= @TotalCount
BEGIN
SET @TableName = NULL
	SELECT @TableName = TableName FROM #TEMP WHERE ID = @Count
	EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)

	SET @Count = @Count + 1
END


End
